message: ci: replace toolchain action to drop set-output warnings

files.patch:
@@ -14,11 +14,7 @@ jobs:
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
       - name: Install Rust (nightly for portable_simd)
-        uses: actions-rs/toolchain@v1
-        with:
-          profile: minimal
-          toolchain: nightly
-          override: true
+        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
       - name: Run cargo test (core + optional python features, skip lapack)
         run: |
           cargo test --features "numpy_support test_utils"
@@ -30,11 +26,7 @@ jobs:
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
       - name: Install Rust (nightly for portable_simd)
-        uses: actions-rs/toolchain@v1
-        with:
-          profile: minimal
-          toolchain: nightly
-          override: true
+        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
       - name: Run ignored very-hard CMA-ES suite (GitHub compute only)
         env:
           RUST_BACKTRACE: 1
@@ -47,11 +39,7 @@ jobs:
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
       - name: Install Rust (nightly for portable_simd)
-        uses: actions-rs/toolchain@v1
-        with:
-          profile: minimal
-          toolchain: nightly
-          override: true
+        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
       - name: Install uv
         run: |
           curl -LsSf https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sh
@@ -79,11 +67,7 @@ jobs:
           python-version: ${{ matrix.python-version }}
 
       - name: Install Rust (nightly for portable_simd)
-        uses: actions-rs/toolchain@v1
-        with:
-          profile: minimal
-          toolchain: nightly
-          override: true
+        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
 
       - name: Install maturin
         run: pip install maturin==1.*
